title: Debug ADADAS LOCF imputation and visit windowing errors

inputs.prompt: The following R program creates ADADAS but has 4 bugs: (1) LOCF imputation carries forward the baseline value (VISITNUM==0) to post-baseline visits, but should only carry forward post-baseline observations, (2) Visit window for Week 24 has AWHI=252 instead of 336, cutting off late-visit records that should be windowed to Week 24, (3) ANL01FL (analysis flag) is set for all PARAMCD values but should only be set for PARAMCD='ACTOT' per the SAP, (4) CHG calculation is BASE - AVAL (inverted) instead of AVAL - BASE. Fix all bugs.
